sections.paragraph:
κημόω fut. κημώσω to muzzle (X., R. Equ. 5, 3) βοῦν ἀλοῶντα an ox that is treading out the grain 1 Cor 9:9 (v.l. φιμόω, q.v.); 1 Ti 5:18 D.—DELG s.v. κημός.

fut. fut. = fut.

  1. X. = Xenophon, V–IV b.c.—List 5

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

q.v. q.v. = quod vide (which see, see that which has just been mentioned)

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 542
